# Deleting Your Account and Data

Source: https://heliumedu.freshdesk.com/support/solutions/articles/159000418643

You can permanently remove your Helium account and all associated data at any time. **This action cannot be undone.**

## Before You Delete Your Account

Consider reviewing the following before proceeding:

  * [Using Exports to Backup Data, Move Between Accounts](https://heliumedu.freshdesk.com/support/solutions/articles/159000418665) — export a copy of your data first
  * [How to Export Data to an iCal/ICS File](https://heliumedu.freshdesk.com/support/solutions/articles/159000418692) — export your schedule in a portable format

## Steps to Delete Your Account

  1. Open [**Settings → Import / Export**](https://app.heliumedu.com/settings)
  2. Scroll to the **Danger Zone** section and tap it to expand
  3. Select **Delete Account**
  4. In the confirmation dialog, enter your password (if your account uses one) and tap **Delete**

Once confirmed, your data is removed from Helium's systems immediately, and any active Feed connections will stop working.

## Deleting All Events

The Danger Zone also contains a **Delete All Events** option. This permanently removes every Event from your account without deleting your account itself. Assignments, classes (and their schedules), external calendars, and grades are not affected.

To delete all Events: open [**Settings**](https://app.heliumedu.com/settings), expand **Danger Zone** , and tap **Delete All Events**. Confirm in the dialog that appears.

---

## Helium Classic

In Helium Classic, account deletion is found in a different location:

  1. Sign in to your Helium account
  2. Navigate to [**Account → Settings → Account**](https://www.heliumedu.com/settings/#tab-account)
  3. Select the **Delete Account** button
  4. Enter your password and confirm deletion

 _Helium Classic will remain available through at least Summer 2026._
